title: Why Being a 'Nice' Founder is Killing Your Startup | Intercom, Eoghan McCabe

transcript.text: I would wake up some days in 2020 and I
couldn't see. I think I'm dying. I don't

hard, so unlikely to work. Particularly
now with AI, there's never a point where
you could stop reinventing and stop
